CustomField.description: Minimum days-overdue before an invoice is included in the Watcher AR-aging signal. Default 7. Avoids overlap with the client-facing OverdueReminderScheduleTxt__c reminder #1 (which fires at 1 day overdue). Glen's digest only surfaces invoices that have already had at least one client-side reminder.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days. Default 7. Invoices less than this many days overdue do not appear in the Watcher digest.
CustomField.label: Watcher AR Aging Min Days Overdue
